source.name: Ant Design
source.license_notes: Use source links and summarized guidance only; do not copy full documentation verbatim.

layout_rules: Use a clear empty placeholder when no data is available.
Include a simple create action when the empty state is a fresh-start opportunity.
Customize image and description only when it improves clarity.
accessibility_notes: Do not make the illustration the only explanation.
Keep action text explicit and keyboard reachable.
implementation_hints: Use for compact enterprise empty states inside tables, lists, or transfer components.
Pair with creation CTA when the next step is obvious.

quality.notes: Official Ant Design Empty component summarized.

retrieval.ai_summary: Use Ant Design Empty for concise no-data placeholders in enterprise UI: neutral illustration, clear description, and optional create action for fresh-start states.
